name: cultnet-ts
description: CultNet-style typed direct-pipe messaging and state replication for TypeScript runtimes.

scripts.typecheck: npm run contracts:generate && tsc -p tsconfig.json --pretty false
scripts.test: npm run build && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --test dist-test/test/*.test.js
scripts.test:interop: npm run build && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --test dist-test/test/interop/*.test.js

author: metacratic
